blur_detection.description: The text is sharp and clearly defined with no visible blur.

contrast_assessment.description: Excellent contrast between text and background, ensuring clear text recognition.

glare_identification.description: No glare or bright spots detected that obscure the text.

water_stains.description: No water stains or discolorations are present on the document.

tears_or_folds.description: No tears, creases, or folds are visible on the document.

cut_off_detection.description: No edges of the document are cut off or excluded from the image.

missing_sections.description: All sections of the receipt/invoice are present and complete.

obstructions.description: No obstructions such as objects, fingers, or shadows are present.

classification.error_type: File location is not same as project's location
classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that align with the expense schema, including supplier, consumer, transaction amount, transaction date, invoice/receipt number, tax information, payment method, and item description. Therefore, it is classified as an expense. The expense type is classified as 'other' since it does not fit into the predefined categories. The document location is Austria, which does not match the expected location of Switzerland.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document contains 8 out of 8 required fields, clearly indicating it is an expense document.

extraction.special_notes: Der Verkauf von mit [C] gekennzeichneten Waren erfolgt im Namen und auf Rechnung: ASFINAG AG [C]
extraction.terms_conditions: Daten aus geeichten Anlagen sind durch Sterne gekennzeichnet. Wir haben wieder 24 Stunden am Tag für Sie geöffnet!

issues.description: Receipt/Invoice document type is mandatory and must be an actual tax receipt or invoice.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Documents must be actual tax receipts or invoices; booking confirmations will not be sufficient.

issues.description: Receipts/invoices should be reported in the local currency, which is CHF for Switzerland.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: The receipts/invoices should be reported in the local currency.

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt has several compliance issues including incorrect document type, currency, missing company name, address, and registration number on the invoice. Additionally, training expenses require manager approval and all approved expenses will be grossed up if they are not tax-free.
